message:
style(vdbe): reformat closure-style assertions in codegen tests

Reformat two multi-line closure assertions in the codegen test module
(test for INSERT VALUES large i64 literals and test for large LIMIT
literals) to place the closure body and matches! invocation on fewer
lines. This is a pure formatting change with no logic modifications,
bringing the assertions in line with the project rustfmt configuration.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
